jobs.title: Desarrollador/a Front-end Vue
jobs.rawDescription: Desarrollador/a Front-end Vue Company: Ayesa Digital Location: Spain ¡En Ayesa crecemos Contigo! Cada profesional de nuestra empresa es importante para nosotros, nos ayudan a crecer de manera diversa y gracias a ellos somos más de 11.000 personas trabajando con el mismo objetivo internacionalmente en 10 países. Si eres una persona entusiasta y buscas un nuevo reto profesional, ¡Este es tu sitio! Buscamos ampliar nuestro equipo con un/a Desarrollador/a Front-end Vue y comunicaciones para incorporarse con nosotros. ¡Anímate a dar el salto! ¡Te estamos esperando! ¿Qué vas a hacer? Desarrollar nuevas funcionalidades, junto al equipo, en Vue.js ¿Qué te pedimos? Desarrollar nuevas funcionalidades, junto al equipo, en Vue.js (Vue 3 con Composition API), TypeScript y Tailwind CSS. Dominio de programación reactiva con la Reactivity API de Vue (ref, reactive, computed, watch) y/o VueUse, y experiencia en la integración y consumo de APIs. Experiencia escribiendo tests unitarios para asegurar la calidad y estabilidad del código. Aplicar buenas prácticas en arquitectura de componentes, modularidad y optimización de rendimiento de aplicaciones SPA. Experiencia trabajando con Git. Capacidad de trabajo en equipo, ser una persona detallista y con capacidad resolutiva. Alta capacidad de participación y proactividad, ser una persona comunicativa con el resto del equipo. Experiencia en el manejo de estados complejos con librerías como Pinia o Vuex. Conocimientos en Cloud y flujos de integración/despliegue continuo (CI/CD). Experiencia previa trabajando con Node o Python en el lado del backend. ¿Dónde trabajarás? Remoto 100% ¿Qué horario realizarás? - 40 horas semanales. Te ofrecemos un camino lleno de aventuras: · ¡Llega hasta donde tú quieras! ¡Crece con nuestros programas de desarrollo! Te ayudaremos a marcar tu itinerario de futuro anualmente participando en proyectos vanguardistas con los mejores profesionales del sector. · Porque lo importante sois tú y los tuyos : contamos con po

score.reason: Excellent stack match: Vue 3 Composition API, TypeScript, Tailwind, and Pinia are core requirements. 100% remote in Spain, but role appears mid-level for a senior engineer.

jobs.title: Senior Vue Frontend Lead — 100% Remote, Flexible Hours

jobs.title: Ingeniero/a HyCOB Front Vue.js. Híbrido
jobs.rawDescription: Metrica busca un / a Ingeniero / a HyCOB Front Vue.js para unirse a nuestro equipo en León, con al menos 2-3 años de experiencia en desarrollo front-end, especialmente con Vue.js. Esta es una oportunidad de trabajo híbrido, con un 60% de teletrabajo. Funciones Definición de la arquitectura del front de una plataforma de ciberdefensa. Liderar la evolución de componentes y flujos. Garantizar el rendimiento y la calidad. Coordinar con arquitectura y backend. Supervisar la documentación y aplicar buenas prácticas. Requisitos Requisitos imprescindibles Amplia experiencia en desarrollo front-end avanzado con JavaScript y TypeScript. Dominio de frameworks como Vue, React o Angular. Diseño de arquitecturas front modulares. Integración con APIs complejas. Uso de herramientas de rendimiento y monitorización. Experiencia con CI / CD, Docker y despliegues en entornos controlados. Se requiere titulación de Ciclo Formativo de Grado Superior o un Grado Universitario de Ingeniería Informática, de Telecomunicaciones o similar. Nivel de inglés : B2 / C1. Requisitos deseables Experiencia liderando diseño técnico. Creación de librerías de componentes. Conocimientos de optimización de cargas. Seguridad en front. Colaboración con equipos backend, DevSecOps y UX. Certificaciones valorables Frontend avanzado, arquitectura o cloud. Habilidades personales Liderazgo técnico. Visión arquitectónica. Capacidad de mentorización. Comunicación clara y orientación a resultados. Si cumples con los requisitos y estás buscando un reto profesional esta es tu empresa, ¡nos encantaría conocerte! Únete a Metrica y sé parte de nuestro éxito. J-18808-Ljbffr

score.reason: Perfect Vue + TypeScript engineer match. Lead-level architecture and mentoring role in Spain, hybrid with 60% remote.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

score.reason: Vue.js is primary with strong JS/CSS fundamentals match; location explicitly includes Spain and remote EU. TypeScript is bonus (not core) and Capacitor/Ionic not mentioned, but a solid senior frontend fit.

jobs.title: Lead Front-end Engineer - REMOTE - VUE.JS
jobs.rawDescription: • YOUR ROLE • We need someone like you to help create software solutions that help millions of users make informed decisions. If you’re looking to make an impact while leveraging groundbreaking technologies, this is the place for you. At Launch Potato you will be an integral member of the LP Tech Team where you will have the opportunity to lead our technical path and be empowered to drive our products. Our team has built groundbreaking technology that helps us understand our millions of users and helps them reach their personal goals every day across our portfolio of brands. On any given day you might be working on our proprietary platform creating solutions that improve the UIs we use to visualize and manage our data. Or you might be improving the user experience on one of our owned and operated sites by launching a new product. Whatever it may be, you will be making an impact! You will be working cross-functionally with passionate, extremely smart individuals with tons of opportunities for learning, growth, and mentorship. We are an extremely fun and tight-knit team (our company retreats are fabulous), so we are very selective about who we hire to ensure our company values remain high. • As part of the LP Tech Team, will have access to the best tools to remove any blockers and enable your success. On a typical day you might: • Develop javascript component-based plugins • Write front end code for dashboards that allow non-technical users to intuitively interact with data • Collaborate with product managers, designers, stakeholders, anyone to help create the best product possible • Coach and mentor other engineers on best practices • Research new technologies and prototype potential solutions • Lead discussions about project architecture and technical feasibility • Build internal tools used to increase team productivity • Our current tech stack: • Frontend languages and Libraries • HTML5/Javascript, • jQuery, Vue.js, React, Node.js, GraphQL • CSS Grid, flexbox, boot

score.reason: Vue primary framework matches your expertise; lead seniority is ideal. GraphQL is a core gap, though learnable for a senior engineer.
red_flags: GraphQL required but not in skills matrix

Retribución flexible : Tarjeta restaurante, cheque guardería, seguro médico, formación y otros beneficios con ventajas fiscales. Club de ventajas : Descuentos en tecnología, ocio y formación. Formación continua : Acceso a Udemy

jobs.title: Senior Developer FullStack (Vue y Nodejs). Inglés alto.
jobs.rawDescription: ¡Atención, amante de la tecnología! Si eres una persona curiosa, creativa y con pasión por la innovación, ¡esta oportunidad es para ti! En nuestro equipo, buscamos mentes inquietas como la tuya, dispuestas a formar parte de Comunidades tecnológicas donde construir conjuntamente. ¡Prepárate para un viaje emocionante! Pero antes de nada, ¿nos presentamos? Somos atmira, un ecosistema de interacción centrado en las personas. Nuestro objetivo es ayudarte a desarrollarte tanto personal como profesionalmente. A través de nuestro Club, podrás relacionarte, vivir experiencias profesionales y alcanzar tus metas. En atmira, tú eres el protagonista y tienes el poder de explorar tu potencial con #Icouldbe Y ahora que ya nos conocemos un poco más… ¿A qué te vas a dedicar? Trabajarás en un proyecto junto a uno de nuestros clientes donde podrás realizar desarrollos y dar apoyo técnico al mismo. Tus funciones principales serán las siguientes: • Participar en el análisis funcional de las necesidades del usuario (Kanban/Agile). • Elaborar diseños técnicos basados en especificaciones funcionales. • Analizar y desarrollar componentes utilizando lenguajes definidos e interfaces. • contribuir al desarrollo y la implementación de aplicaciones (prototipos y módulos). • Documentar todo el trabajo de desarrollo, componentes y módulos según los estándares. • Participar en revisiones de código. • Definir protocolos y escenarios de pruebas de integración. • Realizar pruebas, identificar y resolver cualquier problema. • Participar en el mantenimiento correctivo y evolutivo de todas las aplicaciones desarrolladas. • Proponer mejoras durante las reuniones técnicas. Con qué tecnología trabajarás principalmente? Trabajarás con Vue.js, Node.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, MVC, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Linux, TDD, GIT, SCRUM, Kanban. Es necesario un nivel de inglés alto porque es un proyecto internacional. ¿Te resulta interesante? Tenemos más que contarte: 🌱 Un fantástico equipo de personas que te ayudará

score.reason: Strong Vue.js fit as primary framework; Spanish location aligns. However, atmira's staffing model indicates client augmentation (red flag), FullStack requirement emphasizes weak Node expertise, and remote status is unclear.

jobs.title: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue)
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bulgaria, Bosnia, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Romania, Serbia, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Finland, Norway, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Germany, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Product Engineer (TS/NodeJS/Vue) The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. 🎯 Your main goal will be to build and ship end-to-end TypeScript product features that customers feel in their workflows the same week - balancing speed, quality, and high security standards. To do so, you’ll own outcomes across the full stack and stay close to users, product, and metrics: End-to-end product ownership Own a product area surface from discovery to delivery, including iteration after launch. Ship high-quality features fast across the TypeScript stack, balancing UX, performance, and maintainability. Partner closely with Product to translate customer problems into clear scopes and

score.reason: Strong Vue and TypeScript match at senior level. Spain explicitly listed in office locations. Concern: full-stack product engineering role likely requires deep Node.js backend work—Alfonso's Node expertise is basic, creating a significant skill gap.

jobs.title: Front End vue/nuxt 100% remoto
jobs.rawDescription: ¿De qué va la empresa en la que trabajarás? Somos Slashmobility una empresa boutique especializada en transformación digital y comprometida con las personas. Nuestro propósito se centra en acompañar a nuestros clientes en su impulso a la aceleración digital tecnológica a través de las apps y el talento IT. Con +14 años de experiencia, un equipo comprometido, +500 proyectos ejecutados con éxito, hemos acompañado a centenares de clientes líderes en su sector desde la confianza, flexibilidad y solidez a enfrentarse a los desafíos de la aceleración digital de la sociedad. ¿Y qué nos hace especiales? Nos basamos en cuatro valores fundamentales: • Innovación, ofreciendo soluciones innovadoras de una manera profesional y rentable con un valor diferencial: el conocimiento experto en toda la cadena de valor. • Compromiso ya que llevamos como propios los objetivos de la organización y superamos cualquier obstáculo para lograrlos. • Proactividad, proveyendo y realizando acciones para mejorar sus servicios y calidad. • Trabajo en equipo, contando con un equipo motivado y multidisciplinar que trabaja en perfecta coordinación para lograr los objetivos comunes. • Experiencia como Frontend Developer • Experiencia con los frameworks de JavaScript (Vue 3 y/o Nuxt3) • Conocimientos en ECMASript, HTML, CSS • Experiencia con Unix y Nginx (es un plus) • Full-remote

score.reason: Boutique consultancy model signals staff augmentation (multiple client engagements, not product-focused). Seniority level unstated, likely mid-level rather than senior. Vue 3 expertise matches well, but agency structure and unclear senior positioning are significant concerns.

jobs.title: Intermediate Frontend Engineer (Vue.js), Plan: Product Planning

Our mission is to enable everyone to contribute to and co-create the software that powers our world. Thanks to products like Duo Enterprise and Duo Agent Platform, customers get AI benefits at every stage of the SDLC. The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. Our high-performance culture is driven by our values and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. Co-create the future with us as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software. An overview of this role As a frontend engineer on the Plan: Product Planning team you’ll work primarily on the work-items views. Read more in our epics: lists, agile boards, table view, saved views. We’re currently a team of 5 backend, 3 frontend, and 1 fullstack engineer, a product manager, an engineering manager, and a designer. We work in smaller sub-teams of 2-5 engineers focusing on a single project for 1-3 months. Every month one engineer is assigned to the quality rotation working on performance, monitoring, security vulnerabilities, and maintenance issues. We meet once a week, project teams can have their own calls, but we mostly work asynchronously. We mostly work with Vue.js and Apollo Client moving GitLab into the SPA-like experienc

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (Node/Vue/TypeScript) - Remote Europe
jobs.location: Remote (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer (Node/Vue/TypeScript) - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities You will join and work on our book editing tool. Here's what you'll do: Work closely with our designers and engineers to design, build, and ship new features from scratch; Extend the growing feature set of our cutting-edge, collaborative word processor; Deliver real value to our users by crafting beautiful book templates for their e-readers and for print; Architect and develop highly scalable web applications; Evaluate and improve the performance, durability, and security of applications in production; Take ownership for your tasks and see features through from start to finish; Help teammates improve when reviewing their work and appreciate feedback when they reciprocate. Requirements Professional experience with NodeJS, VueJS, TypeScript and NoSQL (Redis, MongoDB) databases. A good understanding of modern HTML and CSS. Strong test-driven approach to development. Perfectly fluent in English. Enjoy working remotely. Bonus points Professional experience with building and deploying Single Page Apps. Knowledge of ShareDB and LaTeX. Experience with CSS pre-processors, such as SASS or LESS. Experience building production-grade applications integrating LLMs. Experience with build-chain and deployment automation tools, such as Webpack and Github Actions. A good dose of ambition, a willingness to learn, and a great sense of humor. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team re

score.reason: Strong Vue/TypeScript expertise matches the collaborative editor focus, but required MongoDB/Redis database experience is a substantial gap. Full-stack role expectations create hiring risk without significant ramp-up.

jobs.title: Senior Fullstack Developer
jobs.rawDescription: We are looking for new professionals to join Pareto's journey Pareto is a growing software company built around experienced professionals and a sharp focus on what delivers results. We currently have over 50 senior software professionals on our team, and we’re hiring more this year. We’re looking for an experienced fullstack developer who wants to work on challenging client projects across industries. What will you do? You will work on our clients’ product development, typically as a developer, occasionally as an architect or technical lead when the project calls for it. We deliver full projects and integrate into our clients’ teams. Projects span industries like technology, manufacturing, defense, process industry, energy, logistics, food production, healthcare, and the public sector. The common factor: complex systems that require broad technical expertise across the full stack. You’ll have direct influence on client projects, technology choices, and engineering practices. What we expect At least 8 years of experience in software development. You work across the full stack and take ownership of what you build. Interest in AI-assisted development is expected. Experience with tools like Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, or similar is an advantage. We work AI-natively and expect our developers to do the same. Strong experience with modern frontend frameworks such as React or Vue, and solid backend skills in Node.js, Python, Java, .NET, or similar. Databases and integrations are familiar territory. Experience with cloud platforms, primarily Azure or AWS. Ability to work with clients. You can communicate technical decisions in business terms and adapt to different organizational contexts. High standards for code quality. Maintainability, testability, and DevOps practices are part of how you work every day. What we offer Salary based on your experience: 4500–6500 EUR/month. Comprehensive benefits: extensive occupational healthcare, leisure-time accident and travel insuran

score.reason: Weak fullstack fit: Vue is listed but not primary (React or Vue equally). Solid Node.js required; Alfonso has basic expertise. Confirmed agency staff-augmentation model (client-facing consultancy, rotating projects across industries). Remote policy unspecified.
red_flags: Solid Node.js required, Alfonso has basic

needsReview.title: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK
needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK About Sentry Bad software is everywhere, and we’re tired of it. Sentry is on a mission to help developers write better software faster so we can get back to enjoying technology. With more than $217 million in funding and 100,000+ organizations that believe we’re on to something, we're building performance and error monitoring tools that help companies like Disney, Microsoft, and Atlassian spend less time fixing bugs and more time building products. Sentry embraces a hybrid work model across our global hubs, with Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays set as in-office anchor days to encourage meaningful collaboration. If you like to selfishly build things that make your digital life better, come help us build the next generation of software monitoring tools. About this role Are you ready to redefine the future of JavaScript development? Are you a seasoned JavaScript expert who gets a thrill from tackling complex challenges across the entire JavaScript ecosystem? Do you believe that AI can be a powerful partner in crafting elegant, high-impact code? If you're ready to leave the mundane behind and join a team that's shaping the tools used by millions of developers globally, we've got an opportunity for you at Sentry. This isn't your typical Senior Software Engineer position. As a key member of our growing JavaScript SDK team, you'll be at the forefront of innovation, working on everything from our cutting-edge SDKs for the React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Hono, NestJS, and beyond. You won't just be maintaining code; you'll be pushing the boundaries of what's possible in developer tooling across the full spectrum of the modern JavaScript framework landscape. In this role you will Join our JavaScript SDK team and get ready to build the future. You'll be at the forefront, working on: A Universe of JavaScript Challenges: Dive deep into our extensive suite of JavaScript SDKs, with a broad focus on framework support spanning the mode

score.reason: Senior role matching expertise level. Incompatible due to Toronto hybrid office (needs Spain-based remote) and SDK focus rather than Vue product development.

needsReview.title: Frontend Web Developer
needsReview.rawDescription: About Air Apps At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger-and moving faster. We're a family-founded company on a mission to create the world's first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018-and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco-we've remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide. Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you'll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe. Join us on this journey to redefine resource management-and change lives along the way. The Role As a Front-End Web Developer at Air Apps, you will be responsible for crafting seamless, high-performance, and visually engaging web experiences. You will work closely with designers, product managers, and back-end developers to build and optimize user interfaces using modern web technologies. Your work will directly impact millions of users, ensuring intuitive and efficient interactions with our AI-powered platform.This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts. ResponsibilitiesDevelop and maintain responsive, user-friendly web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript frameworks such as React, Vue, or Angular. Collaborate with UI/UX designers to translate design concepts into interactive and accessible web interfaces. Optimize applications for performance, scalability, and cross-browser compatibility. Implement reusable components and maintainable front-end architectures. Work closely with back-end developers to integrate APIs and ensure seamless data flow. Stay up-to-date with emerging f

score.reason: Onsite position in Lisbon requiring relocation from Spain is a hard reject per location requirements. Vue is secondary to React/Angular (capped at 30), seniority appears mid-level not senior+, and TypeScript conspicuously absent from core requirements.
red_flags: fully onsite, relocation required outside Spain

needsReview.title: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural lang
needsReview.company: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed d
needsReview.location: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural language, offering insights to SMBs they couldn't get before. We're fully funded by our sibling company, and are looking for remote freelancers in the US and full-time, onsite employees in San Diego, California (if you're into that kind of thing). We're looking for experience in the following roles: + QA: We're looking for a QA engineer deeply familiar with the software lifecycle in the age of agentic coding. You'd have a lot of responsibility, but also the opportunity to define what solid QA looks like at Ontix. + Azure Cloud Engineer: We're a mostly-AWS shop, but we have a few potential customers that are deeply entrenched in the Azure ecosystem, including a migration from SharePoint to Fabric + OneLake. You'd be leading the charge on that. + Infosec + Automated Vulnerability Scanning: If you browse new CVEs over breakfast, we want to talk to you. There's a huge demand among our current customers for continuous vulnerability scanning, both in the codebase and on the deployed edge. We have some test platforms, but would love a more robust solution we can market. + Full-Stack WordPress Developer: Our sister company is a bit old school still: If you can parachute in to a PHP + Vue 2/3 + WordPress + AWS EC2 environment, we would love to pass on your number to them. We're looking to grow quickly as our client base expands. Healthcare, vision, and 401(k) for FTEs. If you're interested in any of these roles, or would like more information in general about us, please visit https://ontix.io or email l33t@ontix.io with a few sentences describing your experience, interest, and where you're located.

needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer - TypeScript /Node.js About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz. Team The Engineering & Data team builds innovative tech products and platforms to support the impressive growth of their gaming and consumer apps which allow Voodoo to stay at the forefront of the mobile gaming industry. You’ll join our Engineering team, working within a dedicated squad of up to 10 members. This role offers a unique chance to collaborate closely, innovate, and drive impactful results end-to-end. In this role, you’ll take full ownership of your scope from solution design to deployment, balancing quality with efficient delivery.
